## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One paragraph max. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Refactoring (`refactor:`, no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] CI / Build (`ci:` / `build:`)

> The PR title should follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org)
> — it drives automated versioning and the changelog.

## Related issues

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes (if docs changed)
- [ ] Datasource docs updated if a vendor mapping changed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data committed

<!-- How did you verify this change? -->
